title: hypericum palustre
intro: Hypericum palustre, also known as marsh St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the St. John's Wort family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The plant is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing anxiety and stress, promoting wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. Hypericum palustre can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile remedy for various health issues.
